query:
INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, hasStock, sortOrder) 
SELECT 1, c.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, 'active', true, p.sortOrder
FROM categories c
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 'Combo Clássico' as name, 'X-Burguer + Batata média + Refrigerante 350ml' as description, 35.90 as price, 1 as sortOrder
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Combo Premium', 'Angus Premium + Batata grande + Refrigerante 500ml', 52.90, 2
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Combo Família', '2 X-Tudo + Batata família + 2 Refrigerantes 500ml', 79.90, 3
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Combo Kids', 'Mini Burguer + Batata pequena + Suco de caixinha', 28.90, 4
) p
WHERE c.name = 'Combos' AND c.establishmentId = 1;
